name: sap-dev-core
description: Core SAP development utilities and ABAP Workbench automation: login, connection management, credential storage, BDC execution, add-on table maintenance, and SAP GUI Scripting for SE38, SE37, SE24, SE11, SE19, SE41, SE51, SE54, SE91, CMOD, and GUI recording. Also provides shared resources (shared/tables/, shared/scripts/) used by all other sap-dev plugins. Install this plugin first.
